nodes.label: Admin Router
nodes.summary: Vue Router configuration for the admin panel, grouping all admin-side routes.

nodes.label: Miniprogram Tab Pages
nodes.summary: Main tabBar entries in miniprogram/app.json: index, periods, and profile pages with startup routing logic.

nodes.label: Insight Workflow Pages
nodes.summary: Pages for displaying and managing 小凡看见 content, insight requests, approvals, danmaku, likes, and user profile context.

nodes.label: Public Browse Pages
nodes.summary: Public and semi-public learning browse pages including periods, courses, reading-mode, and legal pages accessible before or around authentication.

nodes.label: Admin Management Views
nodes.summary: Admin views for dashboard metrics, enrollments, payments, periods, users, and content management via admin API and backend routes.

nodes.label: Admin Operational Views
nodes.summary: Admin screens for check-ins, insights, analytics, audit logs, database comparison, subscription debugging, and account management requiring careful auth.

nodes.label: External Integrations
nodes.summary: All integration points with the WeChat platform: OAuth login, subscribe messages, JS-SDK, and WeChat Pay.

nodes.label: Socket.IO Runtime
nodes.summary: Realtime runtime in backend/src/server.js and backend/src/utils/websocket.js that tracks user-to-socket mappings for targeted and broadcast notifications.

nodes.label: WeChat Subscribe Message API
nodes.summary: WeChat subscribe-message send endpoint used by subscribe-message.service.js to deliver scene-specific templated reminders with grant tracking.

nodes.label: Backend Services
nodes.summary: Core backend service layer in backend/src/services/ that orchestrates all external WeChat and internal integrations.

nodes.label: WeChat Login API
nodes.summary: api.weixin.qq.com/sns/jscode2session endpoint used to exchange miniprogram login codes for openid.

nodes.label: WeChat Token and Ticket API
nodes.summary: api.weixin.qq.com/cgi-bin/ endpoints for obtaining access_token and jsapi_ticket.

nodes.label: WeChat Pay API
nodes.summary: api.mch.weixin.qq.com/pay/unifiedorder endpoint for creating prepay orders and receiving payment callbacks.

nodes.label: wx Client APIs
nodes.summary: Miniprogram-side wx APIs (wx.login, wx.requestPayment, wx.requestSubscribeMessage) that obtain login codes and permissions.

nodes.label: Email Runtime
nodes.summary: Nodemailer-based email delivery runtime available for mail delivery features in the backend.

nodes.label: admin/src/services/api.ts
nodes.summary: Admin frontend API service layer that admin management views call to reach backend /api/v1 routes.

nodes.label: miniprogram/app.json
nodes.summary: Miniprogram app configuration file that defines the tabBar entries and page routes.

nodes.label: miniprogram/app.js
nodes.summary: Miniprogram startup script that chooses routing based on environment, login state, and external launch path.

nodes.label: subscribe-message.service.js
nodes.summary: Backend service that builds scene-specific template data, respects grant counts, records delivery attempts, and supports reminder scheduling.

nodes.label: backend/src/utils/websocket.js
nodes.summary: Utility module managing user-to-socket mappings and exposing push methods for controllers and services.

nodes.label: backend/src/server.js
nodes.summary: Backend server entry point where the Socket.IO realtime runtime is created and initialized.

nodes.label: Tenant Model
nodes.summary: MongoDB model storing per-tenant WeChat configuration (appId, appSecret, mchId) for multi-tenant WeChat API calls.

nodes.label: wechat.service.js
nodes.summary: Backend service that dynamically reads tenant WeChat config when calling WeChat APIs.

nodes.label: payment.service.js
nodes.summary: Backend service that dynamically reads tenant payment config when calling WeChat Pay APIs.

exchanges login code for openid via
creates prepay order and receives callback via
